expectations.text: Report includes separate grades for typography, color, spacing, layout, and polish
expectations.evidence: Report includes separate graded sections: Typography (D+), Color (C), Layout & Spacing (B+), Visual Details & Atmosphere (D), Accessibility (A-), Differentiation (F). Each has an individual letter grade.

expectations.text: Overall grade is A or B (the described design follows best practices)
expectations.evidence: Overall grade is C+. Report states 'It will not break anything, but it will not be remembered either. The design reads as AI-generated dark SaaS template.' The described design objectively follows best practices (8px grid, AA contrast, good fonts), so a C+ is too harsh.

The 'Anti-Slop Detection Summary' table at end of report checks: Generic purple/blue gradient hero (FAIL), Typography > 2 families (PASS), Color palette with no semantic meaning (FAIL), Placeholder content (UNKNOWN), Cards with inconsistent border radius (N/A), Buttons with no hover/focus (UNKNOWN), Stock illustration (FAIL)
